text:
Market today: Chip and tech names are trying to bounce after a global AI sell-off hammered the sector. That's your world — you're 90% concentrated here, so the mood directly hits your book. Add a potential Fed rate hike signal (hidden inflation triggers in the headlines) and margin pressure gets real fast.

Your holdings: AVGO (-13.3%) is your largest position and flagged TRIM — it's already deep in the hole and one more leg down bites hard on margin. PLTR (-12.6%) is flagged SELL — no clear floor yet and your stop at $85 is a long way down. SPAL (-13.7%) is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays daily — losses compound faster than you think, especially on margin. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited data — treat it like a live grenade.

Watch: 1) Whether this tech bounce has legs or fades intraday — a failed bounce in a weak tape is a trap. 2) Any Fed language on inflation; a rate hike narrative crushes growth/tech multiples fast.

Bottom line: You're leveraged and underwater on your biggest names — protect capital now, bounces are for trimming not adding.
